response.justification: While Bogdan brings 16+ years of software development experience and strong engineering fundamentals, his background is predominantly web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js/React). The role requires deep C++ expertise for industrial automation with embedded systems and security standards knowledge—areas where his resume shows minimal practical experience. His only significant C++ role was a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, and there is no demonstrated experience with MQTT, message brokers, industrial protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, OPC UA), or IEC 62443 security standards.
strengths: 16+ years of software development experience with proven progression to senior/staff levels and multi-domain expertise
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, pair programming, CI/CD, and demonstrated ability to mentor teams
Open-source contributions and architectural thinking across distributed systems and event-driven platforms
concerns: Minimal C++ development experience (approximately 6 months at National Instruments; recent work focuses on TypeScript/Node.js/web stack)
No demonstrated expertise in critical areas: MQTT protocols, message brokers, IEC 62443 industrial-cybersecurity standards, or industrial automation domain
Educational background is Computer Science + Fine Arts rather than B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech engineering as specified; no embedded systems or IoT background
